name: webbed-wasm-load-test
description: Runtime load test for the webbed DuckDB extension under duckdb-wasm (regression guard for #96).
//: Pin MUST match the DuckDB engine the tested .wasm is built against. 1.33.1-dev55.0 bundles engine v1.5.3 (source_id 14eca11bd9) — the exact duckdb submodule commit webbed's v1.5.3 build uses — so it loads the v1.5.3 / wasm_eh artifact. A loadable extension is version-hash-locked to its engine; bump this in lockstep with the duckdb submodule (verify with: node -e PRAGMA version) when the stable build moves off v1.5.3.
